name: Hot Cross Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water. Stir in milk, sugar, butter, vanilla, salt, and 3 cups of flour; beat until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in currants, raisins, and enough remaining flour to form a soft dough. Turn onto a floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic (6-8 minutes).
4. Place in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size (about 1 hour).
5. Punch down the dough. Shape into 30 balls and place on greased baking sheets.
6. Cut a cross on top of each roll with a sharp knife. Cover and let rise until doubled again (about 30 minutes).
7. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C). Beat water and egg yolk together; brush over rolls.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and cool on wire racks. For icing, combine all ingredients until smooth; drizzle over rolls before serving.
